approval_status.reason: This is a new marker-denominator reproduction review packet that adds source_opportunity_marker_summary_v1. It has not been explicitly approved by the main thread.

question.exact_mechanism_question: Do fresh same-window no-order summaries reproduce the frozen historical marker ANY|offset_90_120|repair_or_pairing_improving|open_le_1|deficit_0_0_25 in admitted or blocked denominators, and if not, which status/reason/opportunity buckets explain the transfer gap?
question.not_the_prior_run: This is not late_repair90_micro_deficit_repair_guard_no_order_review. The prior run lacked source_opportunity_marker_summary_v1 and could only report marker_count=0 without denominator/reason attribution.

ready_to_execute_if_later_approved.runner_behavior: micro-deficit trading rule disabled; source-opportunity marker denominator summary enabled

required_outputs_if_later_finished: admitted and blocked denominator counts by status/reason/side/offset/source_risk_direction/open_qty_bucket/deficit_bucket
strict micro-deficit marker counts by status and status_reason
bounded_preflight_if_later_approved: Confirm no active xuan-research runner before start.
Confirm shared-ingress client inputs exist and are fresh without modifying them.
Confirm root disk and inode use are safe.
Confirm helper scripts exist and sudo -n -u pmofi works.
Copy only tools/xuan_dplus_passive_passive_shadow_runner.py into an isolated xuan_research run directory.
Do not repo sync/build, do not use service/systemd controls, do not modify broker/shared-ingress/env/live, and do not send orders/cancels/redeems.
post_run_review_chain_if_later_finished: shadow trading acceptance with research_ranking and promotion_gate reported separately
source-opportunity marker denominator scorer or review
local-only next-target review before any runner implementation proposal

keep_requires: source_opportunity_marker_summary_v1 present in aggregate and summaries
admitted plus blocked denominator coverage for the frozen marker buckets
strict micro-deficit marker denominator nonzero and concentrated enough to explain the old transfer gap or nominate exactly one local scorer/guard target without summary-only removal
unknown_if: fields are complete but marker volume is thin or zero
marker is present only in blocked paths and the remaining gap requires private/order truth unavailable in no-order
risk budget fails despite positive pair economics
source-opportunity denominators explain the gap but do not nominate a sample-preserving pre-action control
discard_if: future source_pair/source_residual labels would be required as live criteria
any private-truth, deployable, canary, or promotion claim is made
blocked_only_if: allowlisted artifacts are corrupt or missing

research_ranking.label: KEEP_SOURCE_OPPORTUNITY_MARKER_REPRODUCTION_REVIEW_PACKET_READY
research_ranking.interpretation: The new default-off marker summary closes the known instrumentation gap enough to define one bounded no-order reproduction question. It does not authorize or start the run.

next_executable_action: Wait for exact main-thread approval for late_repair90_micro_deficit_marker_reproduction_no_order_review before any SSH/shadow; otherwise implement a local source-opportunity marker denominator scorer/spec against existing smoke fixtures.
